description: Configure the visualization settings for the Bologna Pasubio scenario in SUMO-GUI to display traffic speeds by changing the edge/lane coloring scheme to 'by current speed'. Run the simulation until at least time step 500 to capture traffic congestion. Save a screenshot of the network view to '~/SUMO_Output/congestion_map.png' and export the visualization settings to '~/SUMO_Output/visualization_settings.xml'.
